legislation.title: New Roads and Street Works Act 1991

sections.title: Advance Notice
sections.desc: Utility companies must give advance notice before starting street works

sections.title: Notice of Starting
sections.desc: At least 7 working days notice before starting works (3 for minor works)

sections.title: Power to Direct Timing
sections.desc: Highway authority can direct timing of proposed works to avoid disruption

sections.title: Restriction on Works Following Reinstatement
sections.desc: No further works within 12 months of substantial road reinstatement

sections.title: Co-ordination of Works
sections.desc: Duty to co-ordinate all works on highway. Multiple works creating >30% capacity loss require co-ordination.

sections.title: Avoidance of Unnecessary Delay
sections.desc: Undertakers must avoid unnecessary delay and clear site when works complete

sections.title: Charges for Occupation
sections.desc: Overrun charges: £250/day (non-traffic-sensitive) to £2,500/day (traffic-sensitive) per direction affected

sections.title: Network Management Duty
sections.desc: Highway authorities must manage road network to secure expeditious movement of traffic

sections.title: Arrangements
sections.desc: Traffic Manager appointment required to deliver network management duty

sections.title: Permit Schemes
sections.desc: Permit scheme allows highway authority to regulate works through permits

sections.title: FPN for Works Offences
sections.desc: Fixed Penalty Notices for non-compliance with permit conditions

sections.title: Increased FPN Level
sections.desc: FPN doubled under SI 2025/1074 from £120 to £240 (non-discounted) for permit breaches

sections.title: Protection of Public Rights
sections.desc: Duty to assert and protect public rights of passage over highways

sections.title: Penalty for Obstruction
sections.desc: Offence to wilfully obstruct free passage along a highway

sections.title: Control of Deposit of Building Materials
sections.desc: Consent needed to deposit building materials on highway

sections.title: Precautions During Works
sections.desc: Fencing, lighting and watching requirements during works adjacent to highway

sections.title: FPN Amount Doubled
sections.desc: Fixed Penalty Notice for permit scheme offences doubled from £120 to £240 (non-discounted: £80 to £160 discounted)

sections.title: Principles of Co-ordination
sections.desc: Works promoters and highway authorities must co-ordinate to minimise disruption

sections.title: Co-ordination Meetings
sections.desc: Regular co-ordination meetings required between highway authority and statutory undertakers

sections.title: National Register (EToN/USRN)
sections.desc: All works must be registered on the national Street Works Register

s59_breach.label: s59 NRSWA breach threshold
s59_breach.desc: Multiple concurrent works creating >30% capacity reduction on a road section

s74_overrun.label: s74 overrun charges
s74_overrun.desc: Charges per day per direction for exceeding agreed works duration

advance_notice_days.label: Advance notice periods by works type
